channel.title: MindExtract
channel.description: MindExtract — download and transcribe video from anywhere

item.title: Version 1.4.0
item.description:
What's New in 1.4.0

  • WhisperKit transcription engine — Replaced whisper.cpp with WhisperKit, running natively on Apple's Neural Engine and GPU via Core ML for significantly faster transcription
  • New model options — Added Large v3 and Large v3 Turbo models for best-in-class accuracy
  • Speaker diarization support — Experimental option to identify different speakers in transcriptions
  • Smaller app size — Removed bundled whisper binary and dylibs; models are now downloaded on-demand as Core ML packages
